//: MCP server definitions with ${ENV_VAR} placeholders, resolved from .env
at load time by runner/config.py. Each job selects only the servers it
needs (jobs/<name>/job.py), so unused connectors never block a run.
Remote (url) servers authenticate via OAuth: run `scripts/render-mcp-json.py`
then `claude` in this repo and use /mcp to complete each OAuth once — the
Claude Code binary caches the tokens and headless SDK runs reuse them.
Endpoints/packages below are the Phase-2/3 starting point — pin or swap
them during those phases if a connector's shape has changed.
